MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-17-560309 WITH CASE CGC-17-560307
Off Calendar Sep-26-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT LOMIO MAHE, AIRLINE COACH SERVICE, INC.'S STIPULATED MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-17-560309 WITH CASE CGC-17-560307.

GRANTED. No opposition filed. Cases CGC-17-560309 and CGC-17-560307 are consolidated for all purposes. The court designates case CGC-17-560307 as the lead case and all future filings should be made under that case number.

An order is signed for Line 9 - 560307 and Line 10 - 560309. (see scanned order for details)
